headline: Assessing Quanta Services (PWR) Valuation After Strong Three Month Share Price Momentum
summary: Quanta Services stock in focus Quanta Services (PWR) has drawn investor attention after recent gains over the past 3 months, with shares closing at $554.38 and company revenue of about $28.48b and net income of about $1.03b. See our latest analysis for Quanta Services. The recent 26.5% three-month share price return and very large five-year total shareholder return of about 5x suggest strong longer-term momentum, even with a small one-day pullback.
